headline: Analyst Says Dell’s Momentum Is Real, But Valuation Is Risky with Stock Up 250% YTD
summary: Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) has become one of the market’s biggest AI winners. The stock has rocketed over 250% year to date and more than 100% in the past month alone, fueled by explosive demand for AI infrastructure. Yet even some bulls are beginning to question how much future growth is already reflected in the share ... Analyst Says Dell’s Momentum Is Real, But Valuation Is Risky with Stock Up 250% YTD

headline: What Should Investors Do With Ciena Stock Ahead of Q2 Earnings?
summary: CIEN heads into Q2 results with a $1.5B revenue outlook, booming AI network demand and a record $7B backlog despite ongoing supply constraints.
